ddls:
CREATE TABLE "buildings" (
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building */,
  "building_name" TEXT /* Name of the building */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the building */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the building */,
  "building_configuration" TEXT /* Configuration details of the building */,
  "occupancy_info" TEXT /* Information about the building's occupancy */,
  "energy_efficiency_rating" TEXT /* Energy efficiency rating of the building */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building where the sensor is deployed */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., temperature, humidity, power) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor within the building */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that provided the reading */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the reading was taken */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the month the reading was taken */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time of day the reading was taken */,
  "temp" REAL /* Temperature reading from the sensor */,
  "humid" INTEGER /* Humidity reading from the sensor */,
  "active_power" INTEGER /* Active power reading from the sensor */,
  "active_energy" REAL /* Active energy reading from the sensor */,
  "sensor_status" TEXT /* Status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  "battery_level" INTEGER /* Battery level of the sensor (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., building manager, maintenance staff, admin) */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building the user is responsible for */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building the alert is for */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor the alert is for */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., temperature, humidity, power) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for triggering the alert */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, inactive, triggered) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message associated with the alert */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert log entry */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert that was triggered */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was triggered */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor reading that triggered the alert */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the resolution of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_logs_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_logs_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_logs_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building the maintenance is for */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor the maintenance is for */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed */,
  "scheduled_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date for the maintenance */,
  "completed_date" TEXT /* Completed date for the maintenance */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the maintenance performed */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy report */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building the report is for */,
  "report_month" INTEGER /* Month the report covers */,
  "report_year" INTEGER /* Year the report covers */,
  "total_active_power" INTEGER /* Total active power consumed during the month */,
  "total_active_energy" REAL /* Total active energy consumed during the month */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the energy report */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_reports_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental report */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building the report is for */,
  "report_month" INTEGER /* Month the report covers */,
  "report_year" INTEGER /* Year the report covers */,
  "average_temp" REAL /* Average temperature during the month */,
  "average_humidity" INTEGER /* Average humidity during the month */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the environmental report */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_reports_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details about the action performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to perform the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
